allow: PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $out | Select-String -Pattern "timesheet","event-export"; "---total errors---"; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "error TS"\).Count)
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; $out | Select-String -Pattern "event-export"; "---total errors---"; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "error TS"\).Count)
